title: Crypto funds see $1B in outflows as Iran tensions revive risk-off sentiment
summary: Institutional investors pulled capital from Bitcoin and Ether products as Iran tension and rising inflation rattled markets, while XRP and Solana funds continued to attract fresh inflows.

title: Ethereum traders say bears ‘in control’ after ETH price drop to $2K
summary: Ether price fell sharply below $2,100 as increasing sell pressure on Binance and persistent ETF outflows fueled bearish momentum.

title: Stocks Fall, Oil Rises as Hormuz Deal Hopes Fade: Markets Wrap
summary: Wall Street’s rebound attempt failed, with stocks falling as oil climbed after doubts resurfaced about an imminent US-Iran deal that would revive energy flows through the key Strait of Hormuz.

title: US Stocks Dip as Investors Eye Inflation, Chips Stocks Retreat
summary: US stocks fell Monday in midday trading as oil prices rebounded amid doubts about the progress of peace talks between the US and Iran. Yields on 10-year Treasuries touched 4.6% and semiconductor stocks traded lower, with sentiment muted and inflation a key concern.

Standard Chartered to Absorb Zodia Custody’s Core Business in Digital Asset Consolidation
Standard Chartered announced Monday that its non-binding offer to acquire Zodia Custody — the digital asset custodian it co-founded in 2020.

Capital B, formerly The Blockchain Group, added 192 BTC for €13 million, pushing its total holdings to 3,135 BTC.

title: Hive Shares Hit Highest Price This Year After Bitcoin Miner Unveils Ontario 'AI Gigafactory'
summary: Hive Digital Technologies’ stock price popped after the Bitcoin miner unveiled a massive data-center buildout in Ontario, Canada.

title: Bank of England, FCA Set Out ‘Shared Vision’ for Tokenization
summary: The UK’s central bank and financial regulator have launched a joint Call for Input as tokenization moves from “pilots to production.”

title: Two more Ethereum Foundation researchers resign amid wave of departures
summary: Carl Beek and Julian Ma announced they were leaving the Ethereum Foundation on Monday, the latest employees to publicly resign.

title: Bitwise to add HYPE to balance sheet using fees from Hyperliquid ETF
summary: Hyperliquid now regularly beats out Ethereum and Solana in weekly blockchain fee generation, driven largely by perpetual futures.
